examples: But the pipe has one major detractor: It's something of a black box.
Probably the biggest detractor from getting up early is not getting enough sleep.
But for every fan there is a detractor, critical not just of the monastery's approach but Shi's own lifestyle.
Holding cash, Miller says, was the single biggest detractor to his performance in 2012.
When something happens that threatens to create a detractor, intervene as quickly as you can.
